details: The agent correctly executed all necessary GitHub API calls (get PR details, get check runs, get comments, get reviews), retrieved accurate data, and produced a complete briefing. The title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping' and author 'joshavant' match the known facts. CI counts were accurately derived from the actual check run data (4 failed, 7 skipped, ~30 passed out of 41 total). The single comment from greptile-apps[bot] was correctly identified and summarized. No hallucination occurred - all information came from actual tool call results.
